title: Brandads 23 AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Use reference image for overall composition, luxury editorial layout, clean architectural styling, typography placement and premium fashion advertisement aesthetic. Create a luxurious 1:1 square high-end watch campaign featuring (two completely different male models) positioned side-by-side in a sophisticated split-panel composition. LEFT SIDE (A handsome male model with sharp jawline, slick-back hairstyle and confident expression) Wearing: (Sage green double-breasted luxury suit with gold buttons) (Cream shirt underneath) (Premium silver automatic wristwatch clearly visible) Pose: (One hand in pocket, the other adjusting the watch) (Powerful executive posture) Background: (Minimal warm beige and soft sand colored backdrop) (Elegant curved arch) (Subtle luxury shadows) (Clean premium studio environment) RIGHT SIDE (A different male model with wavy textured hair and light beard) Wearing: (Deep burgundy turtleneck) (Charcoal tailored trousers) (Long luxury dark coat) Pose: (Walking forward confidently) (Head turned slightly sideways) (Naturally showcasing the luxury watch) Background: (Minimal matte navy blue backdrop) (Clean geometric panels) (Modern luxury lighting gradients) CENTER BRANDING Large luxury color palette: pearl white, graphite, mist blue, and silver controls the palette, accents, background, and supporting visual elements. typography: "VANTORÉ" "TIME REDEFINED" "CRAFTED FOR LEADERS" Additional premium text: "Swiss Made Collection" "Precision • Prestige • Performance" Luxury watch product shots displayed at the bottom corners. visible headline: "THE NEW SIGNAL" product: architectural perfume bottle. fictional brand: Vellum Atelier. campaign mood: minimal high-fashion campaign mood. Style: (Vogue Men editorial photography) (Rolex advertising aesthetic) (Omega luxury campaign style) (Premium men's fashion magazine cover) (Cinematic lighting) (Hasselblad medium-format photography) (Ultra realistic skin texture) (Sharp facial details) (Clean luxury composition) (Modern masculine elegance) (Photorealistic) (Commercial advertising masterpiece) (High-end fashion campaign) Important: (Two completely different male models) (Different faces) (Different hairstyles) (Different outfits) (Different personalities) (Watch must be clearly visible) (Clean minimalist background) (Premium typography) (No women) (No busy background) (No extra accessories) (No text distortion)
